name: Karsu Tekstil Sanayii ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Karsu Tekstil Sanayii ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells yarns in Turkey. The company offers modal, tencel, viscose, banboo, viloft, cotton, linen, silk, cashmere, wool, and m√É¬©lange fashion yarns; viloft, coolmax, thermolite, seacell, smartcell, skincare, trevira, pes, acrylic, and nylon functional yarns; and lenzing FR, modacrylic, kermel, twaron, technora, and meta and para aramid technical yarns. It also provides knitting and weaving fabrics. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Kayseri, Turkey.
